description: Performance tracker tests - verify the system can log sessions, show trends, and provide improvement suggestions
_comment: IMPORTANT: These tests verify that the system correctly tracks performance and provides improvement suggestions. The system should use the performance_tracker tool when users ask about performance. Do NOT expect tool names in responses - expect performance data and suggestions.

cases._comment: User asks for performance dashboard. System should present performance metrics.

cases.input: Give me improvement suggestions based on past performance
cases._comment: User asks for improvement suggestions. System should provide actionable suggestions.

cases.input: Log this session: prostate case, plan score 85, V100 95%
cases._comment: User asks to log a session. System should confirm the logging action.

cases.input: 记录用户反馈：这个方案很好，评分5分
cases._comment: Chinese user asks to log feedback. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: How many sessions have we completed?
cases._comment: User asks about session count. System should present session statistics.
User asks about average score. System should present the average.

cases.input: Log an error: dose engine timeout
cases._comment: User asks to log an error. System should confirm the error logging.
User asks about evolution metrics. System should present self-evolution data.

cases.input: How can we improve the system performance?
cases._comment: User asks for improvement suggestions. System should provide actionable recommendations.
